etymology.description: 歬 (qián, "phonetic element") with original 止(止) (zhǐ, "foot") + 舟(舟) (zhōu, "boat") = foot on boat -> moving forward -> phonetic in 前(前)
etymology.interpretation: The character 歬 originally depicted a foot 止(止) (zhǐ, "foot") on a boat 舟(舟) (zhōu, "boat"), capturing the idea of moving forward, and was used as a phonetic component in the character 前(前) (qián, "front"). Its original meaning has evolved, and it is now primarily recognized as a phonetic component.
